1100000111001101 0110010110011001 1 -> sum: 0010011101100111, cout: 1

1011000011111111 1001011010000111 1 -> sum: 0100011110000111, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
